final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of an astronaut floating in Earth orbit, with a vivid Milky Way and nebula behind, a space station structure at the frame edge.

Style/medium: photorealistic space photography, large-format editorial in the spirit of NASA EVA documentation meets fine-art astrophotography
Composition: wide-angle shot, astronaut centered in mid-frame, space station structure cropped at left/right edge, deep-space backdrop filling the upper two-thirds
Subject: astronaut in a detailed EVA spacesuit — visible helmet visor reflection, suit fabric texture, tether cables, glove stitching — floating weightlessly above Earth's curved horizon
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit; below, the illuminated curvature of Earth with cloud swirls and ocean; behind, a sweeping Milky Way core and colorful nebula clouds in deep space
Lighting/mood: primary light source is Earthshine — soft, cool-blue reflected light wrapping the spacesuit from below — with the deep void of space creating strong contrast; awe-inspiring and vast
Color palette: deep black of space as dominant field, electric blue and white Earthshine as key light, warm amber and violet nebula hues as accent, metallic silver-white spacesuit surface
Materials/textures: matte multi-layer spacesuit fabric with visible seams and patches, polished helmet visor with Earth reflection, worn metal fittings on station structure at edge
Avoid: cartoon or CGI-plastic suit look, lens flare overload, fake star streaks, over-saturated neon nebula, watermark, stuffer aesthetic
